mapper.select: select * from private_message where (user_id = #{userId} and receive_id = #{id}) or (user_id = #{id} and receive_id = #{userId}) order by date_time asc
select * from private_message where (user_id = #{userId} and receive_id = #{id}) or (user_id = #{id} and receive_id = #{userId}) order by date_time desc limit 1
